title: Anthropic launches AI drug discovery program
abstract: Anthropic has launched an AI-driven drug discovery program, bringing the future of pharmaceutical development to life. Imagine an AI assistant scouring through vast amounts of scientific literature and filtering potential drug combinations—like giving you a superpower sidekick for your work! Say goodbye to being overwhelmed by data. Join this perfect collision of technology and medicine today!
abstract_zh: Anthropic 发布了 AI 药物发现项目，让新药研发不再只是科幻！想象一下，AI 小助手帮你翻阅海量文献，筛选出可能的药物组合，就像是给你的工作加了个超能力队友。这回，你再也不用担心被繁重的数据淹没啦！快来加入这场科技与医学的完美碰撞吧！
